Security


This account is protected!
This account has been binded to HWID owner, therefore are included limits on use of the account:
› Transferring items: Forbidden! › Using Mail: Forbidden! › Buy items: Forbidden! › Crystallization items: Forbidden! › Entchant items: Forbidden! › Attribution items: Forbidden! › Destroy items: Forbidden! › Drop items on the ground: Forbidden! › Entchant skills: Forbidden! › Sell items: Forbidden! › Trade: Forbidden!
› Limits do not work only for the owner account! ‹
